description: Set-theoretic overlay of two (Geo)DataFrames — intersection / union / difference / symmetric_difference / identity. Drop-in for Alteryx's Spatial Process tool.

outputs.description: Overlay-result features carrying attributes from both inputs

left_asset_key.label: Left Asset Key
left_asset_key.description: Upstream asset key — first geometry source

right_asset_key.label: Right Asset Key
right_asset_key.description: Upstream asset key — second geometry source

keep_geom_type.label: Keep Geom Type
keep_geom_type.description: Only keep result features whose geometry type matches the left input

geometry_column.label: Geometry Column
geometry_column.description: Geometry column name on both inputs
